name: Nuclear Fission Power Plant
tagline: Controlled chain reaction steam supply that decouples electricity from chemical fuel oxidation for years per refuelling
problem:
Fossil steam ties megawatt-years to combustion chemistry and CO₂ venting. Fission concentrates energy in heavy nuclei — a teaspoon of idea-level fuel carries road-train coal energy if released in a disciplined lattice. The engineering problem is kinetics: sustain exactly one neutron per fission causing another fission; remove heat faster than meltdown; confine radioactive products across earthquakes and human error.

Materials face neutron embrittlement, helium bubbles in vessels, and boron depletion in absorbers. Chemistry faces radiolysis, crud on fuel surfaces, and iodine spike risks during transients.

Socially, the technology cannot be honest without waste stewardship, proliferation safeguards, and transparent regulation — physics alone is insufficient.
overview:
Light-water reactors use low-enriched uranium oxide pellets in zirconium alloy cladding, cooled by pressurised water transferring heat to a steam generator or boiling directly in BWRs. Control rods and soluble boron shim reactivity. Pressurisers or level control maintain coolant inventory. Containment buildings resist pressure from pipe breaks and hydrogen deflagrations if mitigation fails.

Secondary steam systems resemble fossil plants — turbines, condensers, feed trains — except radiation zoning demands remote maintenance and shielding mazes. Spent fuel pools cool decay heat for years before dry cask storage or reprocessing politics.

Advanced designs propose coolants from helium to liquid sodium, each trading corrosion, activation, and leak reactivity.

Operation is a licence to practice applied ethics: every alarm ties to a scenario analysis written in blood or ink from prior plants.

principles.name: Six-factor formula intuition
principles.explanation: Thermal utilisation, resonance escape, fast fission, reproduction factor, non-leakage probabilities multiply to k-effective — kept near 1.000 by operators.

principles.name: Doppler broadening
principles.explanation: Fuel temperature rise broadens resonances, increasing absorption — negative reactivity feedback that buys seconds in transients.

principles.name: Decay heat
principles.explanation: After shutdown, fission products still release ~6-7% power immediately — cooling must persist through blackouts or ponds boil.

principles.name: Dose ALARA
principles.explanation: As low as reasonably achievable — optimisation under uncertainty, not minimisation regardless of cost.

components.name: Reactor pressure vessel
components.function: Contains core and coolant at pressure
components.madeFrom: Forged low-alloy steel with stainless clad

components.name: Fuel assemblies
components.madeFrom: UO₂ pellets, Zircaloy tubes, spacer grids

components.name: Steam generator (PWR)
components.function: Transfers primary heat to secondary feedwater

components.name: Containment and suppression
components.madeFrom: Prestressed concrete, steel liner, ice condensers in some designs

rawMaterials.name: Uranium concentrate
rawMaterials.purpose: Fuel feed after conversion and enrichment
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Terrestrial import — lunar He-3 is a different reactor class
rawMaterials.processingRequired: Conversion to UF₆, centrifuge enrichment, reduction to UO₂

buildSteps.title: Licensing and safety analysis
buildSteps.description: Probabilistic risk assessment; severe accident management; emergency planning zones.
buildSteps.warningNote: Skipping peer review is criminal negligence

buildSteps.title: Fabricate nuclear-grade components
buildSteps.description: Material certificates; weld procedure qualification; clean-room assembly for internals.

buildSteps.title: Fuel load and criticality benchmark
buildSteps.description: Approach critical with small boron dilution steps; compare keff to predictions.
buildSteps.warningNote: Mis-counted bundles have approached criticality wrong — check twice

buildSteps.title: Hot functional testing
buildSteps.description: Run primary loops at temperature without fission power; vibration baseline pumps.
buildSteps.warningNote: Water hammer cracks steam generator tubes

buildSteps.title: Power ascension and relicensing
buildSteps.description: Ramp power through xenon transients; verify radiation monitors; maintain ageing management programmes.
buildSteps.warningNote: Organisational drift causes accidents — training is hardware

history.event: First self-sustaining chain reaction at Chicago Pile-1.
Obninsk APS-1 supplies grid power — first civilian nuclear electricity.
Shippingport reactor demonstrates PWR lineage in United States.

impact:
Nuclear plants supplied large fractions of carbon-free electricity in several nations — and concentrated waste, risk, and regulatory expertise.

Restart without enrichment and metallurgy knowledge is effectively impossible; preserving documents is not enough without institutions.

videos.title: Pressurised water reactor thermohydraulics
videos.description: Accredited nuclear engineering course segments on decay heat and containment.
